checks.name: owner-options-non-executing
checks.detail: all option steps are non-executing drafts

external_learning.name: External learning / anti-closed-door check
external_learning.recommendation: Promote a high-priority reference/candidate through a written review before implementing comparable behavior.

decision_options.title: Keep current state local/report-only for additional review
decision_options.recommended_when: Owner wants more local review before any external mutation.

steps.command: Run local/report-only gates and update handoffs only.

risks: No external publication/tag/release state changes are made by this option.

decision_options.title: Review attached public main state before any tag/release
decision_options.recommended_when: Public history is attached in staging and the next useful external step would be release/tag review.

steps.command: Review public main, v0.1.0, releases, and sanitized surfaces without mutating GitHub.
Confirm any future release uses a new tag and never moves v0.1.0.

risks: Read-only review can prepare an owner decision but must not create tags, releases, artifacts, or reviewer invitations.

decision_options.title: Prepare later v0.1.1 tag/release plan
decision_options.recommended_when: Owner wants a formal follow-up release after main is updated and reviewed.

steps.command: Confirm public main contains intended follow-up commit after owner-approved push or read-only post-push review.
Draft new tag v0.1.1; never move v0.1.0.
Draft release notes/upload checklist only after explicit owner approval.

risks: Tag/release before main review could publish stale or unintended content.

recommendations: Use this packet for owner choice only; it does not approve or perform publication.

Restore is not release work; before any future release decision, rerun `./bootstrap/setup/bootstrap-ai-assets.sh --engine-root "$PWD" --asset-root "$PWD" --restore-smoke-check --both` and review the non-mutating restore boundary.
Public history is attached in staging; review public main and never move v0.1.0 before any release decision.
Treat v0.1.1 as a future follow-up tag candidate only after main is reviewed and owner-approved.

public_snapshot_notice.message: latest-manual-publication-decision-packet.json is a static sanitized snapshot copied into a public artifact; it is not live GitHub state and may describe the staging context at generation time. Regenerate local report-only gates for current status.
